consumableFeatherDescription: Collapses blocks downward to fill gaps and clears any completed lines.
consumableBombaDescription: Clears the entire grid and respawns your pieces.
consumableMirrorDescription: Duplicates the current Ultravibe and adds it to your collection.
consumableLeafDescription: Reduces the chance of negative blocks spawning.
consumableGumDescription: Fills single gaps in non empty lines, then clears those lines.
consumableHammerDescription: Finds the lowest column height and destroys all blocks above that height.
abilityGridShiftDescription: Shifts each player's locked lane one slot clockwise.
consumableButterflyDescription: Mirrors the right half of the board to the left half and clears completed lines.
consumableLuckygonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Lucky permanently.
consumableBrickgonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Brick permanently.
consumableCoggonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Cog permanently.
consumableSlimegonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Slime permanently.
consumableMossgonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Moss permanently.
consumableHeartgonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Heart permanently.
consumableHoneygonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Honeycomb permanently.
consumableTrashgonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Trash permanently.
consumableBluegonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Blue permanently.
consumableGreengonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Green permanently.
consumableOrangegonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Orange permanently.
consumableRedgonDescription: Converts the current Ultravibe to Red permanently.
